'''pagobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:podcar|podcar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podcar|podcar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pagobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægebeth|pægebeth]] || [[word:pægebej|pægebej]] || [[word:pægebesh|pægebesh]] || [[word:pægebe|pægebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagogoboth|pagogoboth]] || [[word:pagogoboj|pagogoboj]] || [[word:pagogobosh|pagogobosh]] || [[word:pagogobo|pagogobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagoboth|pagoboth]] || [[word:pagoboj|pagoboj]] || [[word:pagobosh|pagobosh]] || [[word:pagobo|pagobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagofboth|pagofboth]] || [[word:pagofboj|pagofboj]] || [[word:pagofbosh|pagofbosh]] || [[word:pagofbof|pagofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagobotho|pagobotho]] || [[word:pagobojo|pagobojo]] || [[word:pagobosho|pagobosho]] || [[word:pagoboko|pagoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagoboth|pagoboth]] || [[word:pagoboj|pagoboj]] || [[word:pagobosh|pagobosh]] || [[word:pagobo|pagobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagobothol|pagobothol]] || [[word:pagobojol|pagobojol]] || [[word:pagoboshol|pagoboshol]] || [[word:pagobokol|pagobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagobothotho|pagobothotho]] || [[word:pagobojojo|pagobojojo]] || [[word:pagoboshosho|pagoboshosho]] || [[word:pagoboko|pagoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagobothon|pagobothon]] || [[word:pagobojon|pagobojon]] || [[word:pagoboshon|pagoboshon]] || [[word:pagobokon|pagobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagobothoro|pagobothoro]] || [[word:pagobojoro|pagobojoro]] || [[word:pagoboshoro|pagoboshoro]] || [[word:pagobokoro|pagobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
